// PARTH BHAIYUUU //
the vibe ✨
dark & mysterious
too cool 🖤
PARTH
aka Parth Bhaiyuuu 🖤
  • The one who'd fight the world for us
  • Tattoos, chains & an even bigger heart
  • Protective like a storm, soft like a secret
  • CEO of brooding aesthetics 🎸
  • The kind of bhai songs are written about
// AYUUU //
Dr. Ayush 🩺
pookie 🎀
bad boy ♡
AYUSH
aka Ayuuu 🎀
  • Future doctor with a heart of gold
  • Glasses on, brain on, chaos on 💡
  • Sweet enough to rot your teeth
  • Rocks a pink bow better than anyone
  • Quietly the most talented one in the room
// US THREE //
CEO of chaos + permanent victim + innocent? HA!
my troublemakers ♥
